title: Function/Sub-function by Business Line (Pivot)
grain: one row per function or sub-function (Row Labels), with a summed numeric measure split across business lines
summary: A pivot summarizing an unnamed numeric measure by process taxonomy against business line. Row Labels list functions and their sub-functions; columns give the value for each business line (Commercial & Specialty, Personal, Specialty, Commercial, London Market) plus a Grand Total. It shows how work in each function is distributed across business lines.
use_cases: How is a given function/sub-function split across business lines? (segment)
Which business line carries the most of a given function? (ranking)
Grand total for a function or sub-function across all business lines (lookup)

not_answerable.q: Which specific measure is being summed?
not_answerable.reason: the sheet labels the values only as a Grand Total; the underlying measure name is not stated on the sheet

not_answerable.q: Which delivery country or client do these figures belong to?
not_answerable.reason: this pivot is cut by business line only; it has no country or client dimension

warnings: the summed measure is not labeled on the sheet
Row Labels mixes function (L1) and sub-function (L2) levels with hierarchical subtotals
